items.title: I used to be a die-hard Claude Code user.
items.title_zh: 我曾经是克劳德代码的铁杆用户。
items.description: I used to be a die-hard Claude Code user. Codex has won me over because: → GPT-5.5 is excellent → Fast mode + generous limits = more reps → Little touches like steering, auto remote control on phone, etc But most of all Codex's browser and…
items.description_zh: 我曾经是克劳德代码的铁杆用户。 Codex 赢得了我的青睐，因为： → GPT-5.5 非常出色 → 快速模式 + 慷慨的限制 = 更多次数 → 一些小细节，如转向、手机自动远程控制等 但最重要的是 Codex 的浏览器和……

items.description: I had chronic pain for most of my life until a doctor did an MRI of the pain source and found a congenital condition that was then fixed with surgery. Now I'm wondering if I had 30+ years of pain because doctors worried I was too stupid to…
items.description_zh: 我一生中的大部分时间都患有慢性疼痛，直到医生对疼痛源进行了核磁共振检查，发现了先天性疾病，然后通过手术解决了这个问题。现在我想知道我是否有 30 多年的疼痛，因为医生担心我太愚蠢了……

items.title: A counter to this is "yes but people *don't* ignore it".
items.title_zh: 对此的反驳是“是的，但人们*不会*忽视它”。
items.description: A counter to this is "yes but people *don't* ignore it". But not ignoring things on scans is our norm because, until recently, we only did scans if there was a clear need. If we move to a scan-more-often paradigm, the norms of what we do w…
items.description_zh: 对此的反驳是“是的，但人们*不会*忽视它”。但不忽视扫描中的内容是我们的常态，因为直到最近，我们只在有明确需要的情况下才进行扫描。如果我们转向更频繁地扫描范式，我们所做的事情的规范将......

items.title: Agents are motivating so many healthy software habits.
items.title_zh: 代理正在激发许多健康的软件习惯。
items.description: Agents are motivating so many healthy software habits. Open APIs, documentation (skills), tests (evals), Unix (CLIs), payment & commerce protocols, even wide 𝙰𝚌𝚌𝚎𝚙𝚝 use (markdown/json/html). The original vision of the WWW coming…
items.description_zh: 代理正在激发许多健康的软件习惯。开放 API、文档（技能）、测试（评估）、Unix (CLI)、支付和商务协议，甚至广泛使用 (markdown/json/html)。 WWW 的最初愿景即将到来……
